name: stageflow
description: Standardize Codex planning workflows with durable request artifacts and validation gates.

interface.shortDescription: Plan Codex work and manage intent-preserving docs workflows.
interface.longDescription: Stageflow helps Codex inspect a project, clarify requirements, preserve request-specific artifacts, review plans, require explicit approval, proceed from a validated plan, and manage submodule-backed documentation workflows that preserve user intent and implementation state.
defaultPrompt: Use Stageflow to plan this change before coding.
Use Stageflow to clarify this request and create a validated plan.
